message:
fix(demo): update mermaid showcase error snapshot for hook-modified rendering

The mermaid error sample snapshot needs to match the hook-expanded
mermaid.rs rendering which adds error box display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
